Container.Name: DiscVault
Container.Overview: DiscVault launcher for Unraid Community Apps. It updates and manages the PostgreSQL-backed DiscVault stack while reusing the existing DiscVault beta appdata directory for migration.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: DiscVault web interface. The launcher proxies this port to the DiscVault Next API/UI.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Existing DiscVault beta appdata path. Kept for compatibility with the current beta container template.

Config.Name: Launcher Config Path
Config.Description: Launcher state, generated Compose file, and generated secrets.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Required so the launcher can create and update the DiscVault stack containers.

Config.Name: Existing DiscVault Host Data Path
Config.Description: Host path of the existing DiscVault beta appdata. Must match Data Path so the managed stack can mount the same data from the Docker host.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Data Path
Config.Description: Host path where the launcher stores PostgreSQL data for DiscVault Next.

Config.Name: DiscVault Image
Config.Description: DiscVault application image used by next-api and next-worker. Use auto to follow the launcher channel, for example launcher:dev starts discvault:dev.

Config.Name: Compose Project Name
Config.Description: Stable Docker Compose project name for the managed stack.

Config.Name: Stack Network
Config.Description: Shared Docker network for launcher, API, worker, and PostgreSQL.

Config.Name: Always Recreate Stack
Config.Description: When true, the launcher recreates the managed DiscVault stack on every start after pulling images. Useful for development and troubleshooting.

Config.Name: RP_ID
Config.Description: WebAuthn relying party ID (domain only, no protocol/port).

Config.Name: RP_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Comma-separated WebAuthn allowed origins. Use your real DiscVault URL when using a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Password
Config.Description: Optional stable PostgreSQL password. Leave empty and the launcher generates one in /config/stack.env on first start.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Optional stable JWT signing secret. Leave empty and the launcher generates one in /config/stack.env on first start.
